Circumpolar Data - Prepare Analysis

Jan Jansen

20/07/2021

library(raster)
library(readxl)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(data.table)
library(proj4)
library(stringr)

Setting up the environment

## Jan's local machine:
sci.dir <-      "C:/Users/jjansen/Desktop/science/"
env.derived <-  paste0(sci.dir,"data_environmental/derived/")
#bio.dir <-      paste0(sci.dir,"data_biological/")

## remote repository (DOESN'T WORK YET):
# env.dir <- "https://data.imas.utas.edu.au/data_transfer/admin/files/EnvironmentalData/"

## common paths (after "sci.dir")
tools.dir <-    paste0(sci.dir,"SouthernOceanBiodiversityMapping/Useful_Functions_Tools/")
ARC_Data.dir <- paste0(sci.dir,"SouthernOceanBiodiversityMapping/ARC_Data/")

## R-drive paths
RS.dir <- "R:/IMAS/Antarctic_Seafloor/Clean_Data_For_Permanent_Storage/"
ann.dir <- paste0(RS.dir,"AnnotationLibrary_AllFinishedSurveys/")
##### load still and diatom sample locations and bathymetry:

## from "Readin_Circumpolar_DownwardImage_Data.Rmd"
load(paste0(ARC_Data.dir,"Circumpolar_DownwardImages_metadata.Rdata"))

## from "ReadIn_Circumpolar_Environmental_Data.Rmd"
r2 <- raster(paste0(env.derived,"Circumpolar_EnvData_500m_shelf_bathy_gebco_depth.grd"))

##### load coastline
#stereo <- as.character(r2@crs)
#load(paste0(env.derived,"Circumpolar_Coastline.Rdata"))

source(paste0(tools.dir,"bubbleplot.R"))

Data Preparation - BASED ON UNCORRECTED INDIVIDUAL SURVEY FILES

## load area estimates for each survey (?Why this comment: "no separate area-files for PS96 & PS18")
area_xls_files <- list.files(RS.dir,full.names=TRUE,pattern=".xlsx")
dat_area <- sapply(area_xls_files, readxl::read_excel, simplify=FALSE, skip=1) %>% bind_rows(.id="id")
dat_area_subset <- dat_area[match(unique(dat_area$`image filename`),dat_area$`image filename`),]

## load Biigle image annotations
Biigle_csv_files <- list.files(paste0(ann.dir,"counts/"),full.names=TRUE,recursive=TRUE,pattern="254")
dat_counts <- sapply(Biigle_csv_files, readr::read_csv, simplify=FALSE) %>% bind_rows(.id="id")

##   points = col_character(),

##   annotation_id = col_double()
## )
dat_counts$Label <- gsub(" ","",dat_counts$label_hierarchy) # fixing label names
dat_counts$Label <- gsub(">","__",dat_counts$Label)
dat_counts$Label <- gsub("-","_",dat_counts$Label)

## load %-cover image annotations
cover_csv_files <- list.files(paste0(ann.dir,"cover/"),full.names=TRUE,recursive=TRUE,pattern=".csv")
dat_cover <- sapply(cover_csv_files, readr::read_csv, simplify=FALSE) %>% bind_rows(.id="id")
##

##   Label = col_character(),
##   Annotator = col_character(),
##   Date.annotated = col_datetime(format = ""),
##   LabelPoint = col_double()
## )
dat_cover$Label <- gsub("1","",dat_cover$Label) # fixing label names
dat_cover$Label <- gsub("2","",dat_cover$Label)
dat_cover$Label <- gsub("3","",dat_cover$Label)
dat_cover$Label <- gsub("4","",dat_cover$Label)
dat_cover$Label <- gsub("5","",dat_cover$Label)
## metadata for each image, including cellIDs (things like filename, full_path, surveyID, transectID, cellID, lon, lat, x, y, area, CoralNet, Biigle)
image_metadata <- select(dat.list.clean[[1]],Filename.standardised,lon,lat)
for(i in 2:length(dat.list.clean)){
  message(i)
  print(names(dat.list.clean[[i]]))
  if("lon" %in% names(dat.list.clean[[i]])){ dat.temp <- select(dat.list.clean[[i]],Filename.standardised,lon,lat) }
  if("Lon" %in% names(dat.list.clean[[i]])){ dat.temp <- select(dat.list.clean[[i]],Filename.standardised,Lon,Lat) }
  if("Longitude" %in% names(dat.list.clean[[i]])){ dat.temp <- select(dat.list.clean[[i]],Filename.standardised,Longitude,Latitude) }
  if("GPS_lon" %in% names(dat.list.clean[[i]])){ dat.temp <- select(dat.list.clean[[i]],Filename.standardised,GPS_lon,GPS_lat) }  
  names(dat.temp) <- c("Filename.standardised","lon","lat")
  image_metadata <- rbind(image_metadata,dat.temp)
}
## 2
##  [1] "Filename"              "transectID"            "imageID"              
##  [4] "imageNumber"           "imageSequence"         "lon"                  
##  [7] "lat"                   "image.select"          "dist.from.start"      
## [10] "Filename.standardised"

##  [1] "Filename"              "transectID"            "imageID"

##  [5] "Type"                           "SurveyID"                      
##  [7] "transectID"                     "Filename"                      
##  [9] "Date.Time"                      "brightness"                    
## [11] "t.ID_temp"                      "image.select"                  
## [13] "dist.from.start"                "mean.dist.to.10.nearest.images"
## [15] "dist.from.center"               "Dist.subs..m."                 
## [17] "Filename.standardised"
## 7
##  [1] "Longitude"                      "Latitude"                      
##  [3] "Bathy.depth..m."                "Area"                          
##  [5] "Type"                           "SurveyID"                      
##  [7] "transectID"                     "Filename"                      
##  [9] "Date.Time"                      "Dist.subs..m."

##  [1] "Longitude"                      "Latitude"                      
##  [3] "Depth.water..m."                "Area"                          
##  [5] "Type"                           "SurveyID"                      
##  [7] "transectID"                     "Filename"                      
##  [9] "Date.Time"                      "brightness"                    
## [11] "image.select"                   "dist.from.start"               
## [13] "mean.dist.to.10.nearest.images" "dist.from.center"              
## [15] "Height..m."                     "Filename.standardised"
## 9
##  [1] "Longitude"                      "Latitude"                      
##  [3] "Depth.water..m."                "Area"                          
##  [5] "Type"                           "SurveyID"                      
##  [7] "transectID"                     "Filename"                      
##  [9] "Date.Time"                      "image.select"                  
## [11] "dist.from.start"                "mean.dist.to.10.nearest.images"
## [13] "dist.from.center"               "transectID.forfile"            
## [15] "Filename.standardised"
## 10
##  [1] "GPS_lon"                        "GPS_lat"                       
##  [3] "FileName"                       "GPS_ship_lon"                  
##  [5] "GPS_ship_lat"                   "transectID"                    
##  [7] "image.select"                   "dist.from.start"               
##  [9] "dist.to.start"                  "dist.to.end"                   
## [11] "mean.dist.to.10.nearest.images" "dist.from.center"              
## [13] "Filename.standardised"
## 11
##  [1] "GPS_lon"                        "GPS_lat"                       
##  [3] "FileName"                       "GPS_ship_lon"                  
##  [5] "GPS_ship_lat"                   "SUB1_Altitude"                 
##  [7] "SUB1_USBL_Depth"                "FileName_uniform"              
##  [9] "transectID"                     "image.select"                  
## [11] "dist.from.start"                "dist.to.start"                 
## [13] "dist.to.end"                    "mean.dist.to.10.nearest.images"
## [15] "dist.from.center"               "Filename.standardised"
## 12
##  [1] "GPS_lon"                        "GPS_lat"                       
##  [3] "FileName"                       "GPS_ship_lon"                  
##  [5] "GPS_ship_lat"                   "SUB1_Altitude"                 
##  [7] "SUB1_USBL_Depth"                "transectID"                    
##  [9] "image.select"                   "dist.from.start"               
## [11] "dist.to.start"                  "dist.to.end"                   
## [13] "mean.dist.to.10.nearest.images" "dist.from.center"              
## [15] "Filename.standardised"
## 13
##  [1] "GPS_lon"                        "GPS_lat"                       
##  [3] "FileName"                       "Depth"                         
##  [5] "FileName_uniform"               "transectID"                    
##  [7] "image.select"                   "dist.from.start"               
##  [9] "dist.to.start"                  "dist.to.end"                   
## [11] "mean.dist.to.10.nearest.images" "dist.from.center"              
## [13] "Filename.standardised"
## 14
##  [1] "FileName"                       "transectID"                    
##  [3] "GPS_lat"                        "GPS_lon"                       
##  [5] "foldername"                     "Survey"                        
##  [7] "image.select"                   "dist.from.start"               
##  [9] "dist.to.start"                  "dist.to.end"                   
## [11] "mean.dist.to.10.nearest.images" "dist.from.center"              
## [13] "Filename.standardised"
## 15
##  [1] "id"                    "transectID"            "transectID_folder"    
##  [4] "Filename"              "DateTime"              "lat"                  
##  [7] "lon"                   "pressure"              "altimeter"            
## [10] "salinity"              "temperature"           "scan"                 
## [13] "FilePath"              "image.select"          "Filename.standardised"
## 16
## [1] "surveyID"              "filename_in_folder"    "transectID.raw"       
## [4] "filename"              "lon"                   "lat"                  
## [7] "transectID"            "image.select"          "Filename.standardised"
## 17
##  [1] "surveyID"              "filename_in_folder"    "transectID.raw"       
##  [4] "filename"              "lon"                   "lat"                  
##  [7] "transectID"            "image.number"          "image.select"         
## [10] "dist.from.start"       "Filename.standardised"
## 18
##  [1] "surveyID"              "filename_in_folder"    "transectID.raw"       
##  [4] "filename"              "lon"                   "lat"                  
##  [7] "transectID"            "image.select"          "dist.from.start"      
## [10] "Filename.standardised"
## 19
##  [1] "surveyID"              "filename_in_folder"    "transectID.raw"       
##  [4] "filename"              "lon"                   "lat"                  
##  [7] "transectID"            "image.code"            "image.select"         
## [10] "dist.from.start"       "Filename.standardised"
## 20
##  [1] "surveyID"              "transectID"            "filename_in_folder"   
##  [4] "filename"              "lon"                   "lat"                  
##  [7] "DateTime"              "Timer"                 "image.select"         
## [10] "dist.from.start"       "Filename.standardised"
image_metadata$Filename.standardised <- gsub(".tif",".jpg",image_metadata$Filename.standardised)
image_metadata$proj_coord_x <- project(image_metadata[,2:3], proj=crs(r2))$x
image_metadata$proj_coord_y <- project(image_metadata[,2:3], proj=crs(r2))$y
image_metadata$cellID <- extract(r2, image_metadata[,4:5], cellnumbers=TRUE)[,1]
ids <- unique(image_metadata$cellID)
#
image_metadata$area <- NA
# find matching filenames for area estimates
idx <- match(image_metadata$Filename.standardised,dat_area_subset$`image filename`)
fill.idx <- which(!is.na(idx))
search.idx <- idx[fill.idx]
image_metadata$area[fill.idx] <- dat_area_subset$`image area in m²`[search.idx] # replace area values where filenames match
image_metadata$area <- as.numeric(image_metadata$area)
#
image_metadata$cover <- "no"
image_metadata$counts <- "no"
# find matching filenames for cover
idx <- match(image_metadata$Filename.standardised,unique(dat_cover$Name))
fill.idx <- which(!is.na(idx))
search.idx <- idx[fill.idx]
image_metadata$cover[fill.idx] <- "yes" # replace area values where filenames match
# find matching filenames for counts
idx <- match(image_metadata$Filename.standardised,unique(dat_counts$filename))
fill.idx <- which(!is.na(idx))
search.idx <- idx[fill.idx]
image_metadata$counts[fill.idx] <- "yes" # replace area values where filenames match
# check:
image_metadata[which(image_metadata$cover=="yes"),]

Counts

site(image)-by-species matrix

count_images

labs <- unique(dat_counts$Label)
nams <- unique(dat_counts$filename)
dat_counts_image_by_species <- data.frame(matrix(NA,nrow=length(nams),ncol=length(labs)))
rownames(dat_counts_image_by_species) <- nams
colnames(dat_counts_image_by_species) <- labs
for(i in 1:length(nams)){
  sel.r <- which(dat_counts$filename==nams[i])  
  for(j in 1:length(labs)){
    sel.c <- which(dat_counts$Label[sel.r]==labs[j])  
    dat_counts_image_by_species[i,j] <- length(sel.c)
  }
}

site(cell)-by-species matrix

count_cells

## create new dataframe using image locations
dat_counts_cell_by_species <- data.frame(matrix(NA,nrow=length(ids),ncol=length(labs)))
rownames(dat_counts_cell_by_species) <- ids
colnames(dat_counts_cell_by_species) <- labs
counts_N <- rep(NA, length(labs))
counts_area <- rep(NA, length(labs))
for(i in 1:length(ids)){
  #print(i)
  sel.r <- which(image_metadata$cellID==ids[i]&image_metadata$counts=="yes") # find images that are part of that cell and annotated in biigle
  if(length(sel.r)==0) next # if none of the images are annotated, skip to the next iteration
  sel.names <- image_metadata$Filename.standardised[sel.r] # find the names of these images
  dat.temp <- dat_counts_image_by_species[which(nams%in%sel.names),] # find annotations from these images from the image-dataset
  counts_N[i] <-  nrow(dat.temp)
  counts_area[i] <- sum(image_metadata$area[sel.r])
  dat_counts_cell_by_species[i,] <- colSums(dat.temp)
}

%-cover

site(image)-by-species matrix

cover_images

labs.cov <- unique(dat_cover$Label)
nams.cov <- unique(dat_cover$Name)
dat_cover_image_by_species <- data.frame(matrix(NA,nrow=length(nams.cov),ncol=length(labs.cov)))
rownames(dat_cover_image_by_species) <- nams.cov
colnames(dat_cover_image_by_species) <- labs.cov
for(i in 1:length(nams.cov)){
  sel.r <- which(dat_cover$Name==nams.cov[i])  
  for(j in 1:length(labs.cov)){
    sel.c <- which(dat_cover$Label[sel.r]==labs.cov[j])  
    dat_cover_image_by_species[i,j] <- length(sel.c)
  }
}

site(cell)-by-species matrix

cover_cells

## create new dataframe using image locations
dat_cover_cell_by_species <- data.frame(matrix(NA,nrow=length(ids),ncol=length(labs.cov)))
rownames(dat_cover_cell_by_species) <- ids
colnames(dat_cover_cell_by_species) <- labs.cov
cover_N <- rep(NA, length(labs.cov))
cover_area <- rep(NA, length(labs.cov))
for(i in 1:length(ids)){
  #print(i)
  sel.r <- which(image_metadata$cellID==ids[i]&image_metadata$cover=="yes") # find images that are part of that cell and annotated in coralnet
  if(length(sel.r)==0) next # if none of the images are annotated, skip to the next iteration
  sel.names <- image_metadata$Filename.standardised[sel.r] # find the names of these images
  dat.temp <- dat_cover_image_by_species[which(nams%in%sel.names),] # find annotations from these images from the image-dataset
  cover_N[i] <-  nrow(dat.temp)
  cover_area[i] <- sum(image_metadata$area[sel.r])
  dat_cover_cell_by_species[i,] <- colSums(dat.temp)
}

save output

cover_cells <- dat_cover_cell_by_species[-which(is.na(rowSums(dat_cover_cell_by_species))),]
count_cells <- dat_counts_cell_by_species[-which(is.na(rowSums(dat_counts_cell_by_species))),]
cover_images <- dat_cover_image_by_species
count_images <- dat_counts_image_by_species

image_metadata

##  [ reached 'max' / getOption("max.print") -- omitted 32345 rows ]
save(image_metadata, cover_cells, cover_images, count_cells, count_images,
     file=paste0(ARC_Data.dir,"Circumpolar_Annotation_Data.Rdata"))

Inspect resulting dataframes

locations across a region

## check if things are correct:
plot(r2, xlim=c(0,300000),ylim=c(-2100000,-1800000))
points(image_metadata[,4:5])

a single transect

plot(r2, xlim=c(282500,283500),ylim=c(-2011500,-2010000))
points(image_metadata[,4:5])
points(image_metadata[which(image_metadata$cover=="yes"),4:5],col="red",cex=2)
points(image_metadata[which(image_metadata$counts=="yes"),4:5],col="blue",cex=3)
text(image_metadata[which(image_metadata$cover=="yes"),4:5], labels=image_metadata[which(image_metadata$cover=="yes"),1], adj=-0.2)

aggregated cover of some living things on a single transect

## projected coordinates for plottng
img.coord <- SpatialPoints(coords=image_metadata[,4:5], proj4string=crs(stereo))

#### create subset of data to plot
## all images in that transect
sel <- which(str_detect(image_metadata$Filename.standardised,"tan1901_065"))
## annotated images in that transect
sel2 <- which(str_detect(image_metadata$Filename.standardised,"tan1901_065")&image_metadata$cover=="yes")
# unique(image_metadata$cellID[sel])
# unique(image_metadata$cellID[sel2])

#### just one transect
sel.images <- grep("tan1901_065", rownames(cover_images))
val <- rowSums(cover_images[sel.images,-c(1,3,4,6,7,10)])
plot(r2, xlim=c(282500,283500),ylim=c(-2011500,-2010000))
points(image_metadata[,4:5])
points(image_metadata[which(image_metadata$cover=="yes"),4:5],col="red",cex=0.5)
points(img.coord[sel2], cex=log(val), col="blue")

image_metadata$Filename.standardised[sel]
t.idx <- match(image_metadata$Filename.standardised[sel],rownames(cover_images))
t.search.idx <- t.idx[which(!is.na(t.idx))]
rownames(cover_images)[t.search.idx]
cover_images[t.search.idx,which(colSums(cover_images[t.search.idx,])>0)]

t.idx2 <- match(image_metadata$Filename.standardised[sel],rownames(count_images))
t.search.idx2 <- t.idx2[which(!is.na(t.idx2))]
rownames(count_images)[t.search.idx2]
count_images[t.search.idx2,which(colSums(count_images[t.search.idx2,])>0)]















## site(cell)-by-metadata matrix (lon,lat,N,depth,...)
cell_locations <- data.frame(cbind("cellID"=cids,N,"depth"=extract(r2,cids)))

##
plot(dat_cover_cell_by_species$Sub_Fine~cell_locations$depth)

summary(fit <- glm((dat_cover_cell_by_species$Sub_Fine/N/108)~cell_locations$depth+I(cell_locations$depth^2), family="binomial"))





















































loc <- PS961_dat[,c(17,1,2)] ## selects filename, long, lat from survey data for ALL images
loc.select <- which(loc$Image_Filename%in%a$Image_Filename) ## selects from "loc" which filenames match the SUBSET filenames in "a"
pos.mat <- loc[loc.select,]



## load environmental data



## focus on sample images only
sample.dat <- read.csv(paste0(s.dir,"SampleImages_DavidBarnes.csv"))

###
img.names <- sample.dat$image
sample.dat$cropped.area.in.m2[-c(10:16,40:49)] <- a.subset$`image area in m²`[which(a.subset$`image filename`%in%img.names)]

#####################
area.dat <- sample.dat[,-3]
names(area.dat) <- c("Survey","image","area")
write.csv(area.dat, file=paste0(s.dir,"Sample_images_area.csv"))

## %-cover - filenames-by-species
PS81.ann <- read.csv(paste0(RS.dir,"PS81/PS81_4_annotation_library_cover/PS81_annotations_03_201912.csv"))
PS96.ann <- read.csv(paste0(RS.dir,"PS96/PS96_4_annotation_library_cover/PS96_annotations_03_201912.csv"))
TAN0802.ann <- read.csv(paste0(RS.dir,"TAN0802/TAN0802_4_annotation_library_cover/TAN0802_annotations_03_202001.csv"))
TAN1802.ann <- read.csv(paste0(RS.dir,"TAN1802/TAN1802_4_annotation_library_cover/TAN1802_annotations_03_202003.csv"))
TAN1901.ann <- read.csv(paste0(RS.dir,"TAN1901/TAN1901_4_annotation_library_cover/TAN1901_annotations_03_202006.csv"))
NBP1402.ann <- read.csv(paste0(RS.dir,"NBP1402/NBP1402_4_annotation_library_cover/NBP1402_annotations_01_CoralNet.csv"))
PS18.ann <- read.csv(paste0(RS.dir,"PS18/PS18_4_annotation_library_cover_old/PS18_annotations_01_CoralNet.csv"))

ann.dat <- rbind(PS81.ann[,-7],PS96.ann[,-7],TAN0802.ann[,-7],TAN1802.ann[,-7],TAN1901.ann[,-7],NBP1402.ann,PS18.ann)

ann.dat.subset <- ann.dat[ann.dat$Name%in%img.names,-c(5:6)]
ann.dat.subset$Label <- factor(ann.dat.subset$Label)

ann.dat.cover <- data.frame(matrix(ncol=length(levels(ann.dat.subset$Label)),nrow=length(img.names)),row.names=img.names)
names(ann.dat.cover) <- levels(ann.dat.subset$Label)

for(i in 1:49){
  ann.dat.cover[i,] <- table(ann.dat.subset[ann.dat.subset$Name==img.names[i],4])
}
ann.dat.cover$total_points <- rowSums(ann.dat.cover)

write.csv(ann.dat.cover, file=paste0(s.dir,"Sample_images_cover.csv"))


## counts - filenames-by-species
PS81.ann <- read.csv(paste0(s.dir,"counts/PS81_full_annotation_report_202001.csv"))
PS96.ann <- read.csv(paste0(s.dir,"counts/PS96_full_annotation_report_202001.csv"))
TAN0802.ann <- read.csv(paste0(s.dir,"counts/TAN0802_full_annotation_report_202001.csv"))
TAN1802.ann <- read.csv(paste0(s.dir,"counts/TAN1802_full_annotation_report_202007.csv"))
TAN1901.ann <- read.csv(paste0(s.dir,"counts/TAN1901_full_annotation_report_202007.csv"))
NBP1402.ann <- read.csv(paste0(s.dir,"counts/2205-nbp1402.csv"))
PS18.ann <- read.csv(paste0(s.dir,"counts/2443-ps18.csv"))

ann.dat <- rbind(PS81.ann,PS96.ann,TAN0802.ann,TAN1802.ann,TAN1901.ann,NBP1402.ann,PS18.ann)
ann.dat.subset <- ann.dat[ann.dat$filename%in%img.names,c(9,3,4,14,15)]
ann.dat.subset$label_name <- factor(ann.dat.subset$label_name)

ann.dat.counts <- data.frame(matrix(ncol=length(levels(ann.dat.subset$label_name)),nrow=length(img.names)),row.names=img.names)
names(ann.dat.counts) <- levels(ann.dat.subset$label_name)

for(i in 1:49){
  ann.dat.counts[i,] <- table(ann.dat.subset[ann.dat.subset$filename==img.names[i],2])
}
ann.dat.counts$total_counts <- rowSums(ann.dat.counts)

write.csv(ann.dat.counts, file=paste0(s.dir,"Sample_images_counts.csv"))
